title: MLP totems resource pack
description: This resource pack adds a dozen possible renames for My Little Pony totems.
body:
I am not the creator of this resource pack, I just ported it to a later version, and to make it work on fabric, the creator of all the models and original textures: "FlutMLP, on the website "Minecraft Inside", I'm not sure that he is the creator, but that's where I found this project.
All name of totems:
Twilight Sparkle,
Rainbow Dash,
Applejack,
Rarity,
Fluttershy,
Pinki Pie,
Celestia,
Luna,
Trixie,
Sunset Shimmer,
Starlight Glimmer,
Lauren Faust,
Cadence,
Fizzlepop Berrytwist,
Songbird Serenade
